questions.question: Over the past few years, many new apps ______ to make our life easier.
questions.explanation: 现在完成时被动语态：主语 apps 与 develop 被动，over the past few years 提示现在完成时。

questions.question: The libray ___________________  a year ago to provide students a better learning environment.
questions.explanation: ，而图书馆是被建，因此用was built。

questions.question: The old man found himself ______ out of work after the factory closed.
questions.explanation: find oneself + 过去分词（stuck）表被动状态，意为“发现自己陷入……”。

questions.question: Many articles ______ us how the Internet has changed our lives have been written.
questions.explanation: 现在分词短语作定语表主动动作：articles telling us... = articles that tell us...

questions.question: The puzzle is hard ______.
questions.explanation: 在英语中，当 “主语 + be + 形容词 + 不定式” 结构中的形容词表示 难易、轻重、好坏、舒适程度（如 hard, easy, difficult, heavy, nice, pleasant, comfortable, fit 等）时，不定式用主动形式表被动，这个谜题解决起来很困难。

questions.question: The United Kingdom ______ four countries: England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.
questions.explanation: consist of 无被动形式，主动表“由...组成”。

questions.question: ______ by green mountains, the old castle looks very beautiful.
questions.explanation: 过去分词作状语：castle 与 surround 被动，故用 Surrounded。

questions.question: __________ difficulties, he never loses heart
questions.explanation: 主语he和动词face为主动关系，因此用现在分词作状语表主动。面对困难时，他从不灰心。

questions.question: If ______ properly, the medicine will work very well.
questions.explanation: 连词+过去分词省略结构：If (it is) used properly...，如果被恰当使用的话

questions.question: There ______ a lot of trees here, but now it has become a desert.
questions.explanation: used to do 表示“过去常常/曾经...”，be used to doing习惯做某事；be used to do被用来做
，这里过去曾有许多书，但现在它已经成为了沙漠。

questions.question: We passed by a village, many buildings ___________ on top of big hills
questions.explanation: 独立主格，主语+非谓语结构，building和sit应该是主动关系，因此用现在分词;我们路过一个村庄，很多建筑坐落在大山丘的顶部

questions.question: Imagine ______ the chance to sing on a world stage.
questions.explanation: imagine + doing 是固定用法，想象做某事

questions.question: Imagine ______ the chance to sing on a world stage.
questions.explanation: imagine + doing 是固定用法，想象做某事

questions.question: Festivals can be very ______, and many children are ______ in them.
questions.explanation: -ing 形容词表示“令人...的”，-ed 形容词表示“感到...的”。interesting有趣的；令人有兴趣的；interested感到有趣的；感兴趣的

questions.question: The ______ moon is shining brightly in the sky.
questions.explanation: 现在分词作定语表主动：shining moon = moon that is shining。

questions.question: Of all the traditional festivals, the harvest festival is ______.
questions.explanation: of all... 最高级用法，需用 the most significant。在所有的传统节日里，丰收节是最重要的

questions.question: ______ the heavy rain, they still went to the celebration.
questions.explanation: 让步状语 in spite of = despite，意为“尽管

questions.question: Dr Lin was the first woman ever ______ as a physician in that hospital.
questions.explanation: the + 序数词 + n. + to do 结构。表示“第几个做某事的人”，林医生是第一个被那个医院雇为外科医生的女性，注意此处要用被动式to be done，因为是被雇佣

questions.question: Having ______ over 50,000 babies, she became a legend.
questions.explanation: 现在分词的完成式 having done 强调先于主句动作。

questions.question: The situation ______ he had to make a choice was tough.
questions.explanation: 先行词为抽象地点（situation）且缺状语时，用 where 引导定语从句，他不得不做出选择的这种处境很艰难。

questions.question: ______ a living, he started a small restaurant.
questions.explanation: 不定式作目的状语。为了谋生，他开了一个小餐厅

questions.question: The Mission District, one of the oldest parts of the city, is a place ______ you can see many murals.
questions.explanation: 定语从句 where 修饰 place。

questions.question: The internet makes _______ convenient for us to search for information.
questions.explanation: make it + adj. + (for sb) + to do句式，主语使得做某事（对某人来说）怎么样；因特网使得我们搜索信息很方便。

questions.question: The desire ______ the universe is shared by many people.
questions.explanation: desire/hope/wish等多与未来相关的抽象名词 + to do 作定语表未发生动作。探索宇宙的渴望是很多人所共有的

questions.question: He woke up only ______ everybody had left.
questions.explanation: only to do 表示出乎意料的结果。他醒来结果却发现大家都离开了

questions.question: The astronauts trained very hard ______ into space.
questions.explanation: 不定式作目的状语。为了进入太空，宇航员们很努力地训练

questions.question: Remember ______ the door before you leave.
questions.explanation: remember to do 记得要做；remember doing 记得做过。你离开之前记得要关门

questions.question: The space station ______ next year will be the largest ever.
questions.explanation: 不定式作定语表将来，太空站是被发射，因此要用被动式：to be launched。明年(将要被发射的)太空站将会是有史以来最大的

questions.question: With so many problems ______, the president had a sleepless night.
questions.explanation: with + n. + to do 表示“有...要解决”，不定式充当宾补，表示未发生动作。有这么多问题要解决，总统一夜无眠。

questions.question: It's dangerous ______ the internet without any protection.
questions.explanation: It's adj. + to do 结构，做某事是怎么样的。没有任何保护的情况下使用因特网是非常危险的

questions.question: He is likely ______ late because of the traffic.
questions.explanation: be likely to do 是固定搭配。
